author: Huguccio
title: Summa decretorum, 1 de cons. cc. 1-73
remarks: The commentary on De consecratione is filled with expositio material: on consecration of church, origin of the word missa, institutors, divisio missae, on hours of prayer.
link: Bibliotheca Mediceana Laurenziana, Plut.1 sin.4, 371r ff
